title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital
jsonLd.description:
Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Dhanbad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital:
Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
